allow: PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { foreach \($c in $conn\) { try { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "Killed PID $\($c.OwningProcess\)" } catch { try { & taskkill /F /PID $c.OwningProcess 2>$null; "taskkilled $\($c.OwningProcess\)" } catch { "Could not kill PID $\($c.OwningProcess\)" } } } } else { 'Nothing on 8081' }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; if \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { 'STILL UP' } else { 'PORT 8081 FREE' })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess; if \(-not \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)\) { 'PORT 8081 FREE' })
